description: Coordinate system and spatial math reference -- Three.js right-handed coordinate conventions per Section 8.1-8.3, visible area formulas (visible_height = 2 * d * tan(FOV/2)), plane sizing math, and the relationship between camera distance, FOV, and visible area. This is the spatial foundation all geometry and camera specs reference.
notes: Tier 0 foundation. No dependencies. Codifies spatial conventions for all geometry and camera work. Spec completed via 4-round deliberation. Exports constants (AXIS, DEFAULT_CAMERA, COMPOSITION_PRESETS, FRAME_RATES, PLANE_ROTATIONS), types (Vec3, CameraState, PlaneTransform, FrustumRect, etc.), and pure-math functions (computeFrustumRect, computePlaneSize, computeViewAxisDistance, computeAspectCorrectSize, vector utilities). Zero runtime dependencies. Key decisions: signed view-axis distance, readonly tuples for serialization, scalar oversize factor, degrees for FOV / radians for rotation.
